caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is seated in a recording studio, positioned in front of a gray acoustic foam wall. He is wearing a plain white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. A professional silver microphone, featuring the legible text "Shure SM7B", is positioned closely in front of him on a shock mount. Across the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands. In the initial moments, he looks toward the side with a slight smile, then transitions to speaking with an open mouth while glancing slightly downward. He then shifts his gaze back toward the side, continuing to talk and moving his hand in a sweeping motion across the frame. His expressions and head positioning shift slightly as he engages in conversation throughout the clip.
